stemHtml: Visual Flight Rules – Except when a clearance is obtained from an ATC unit, flights under VFR shall not take off from an aerodrome within a Control Zone or enter a Control Zone when the ceiling is lower than?

options.a: 1000 ft or the ground visibility is less than 5 km.
options.b: 1500 ft or the ground visibility is less than 5 km.
options.c: 1000 ft or the ground visibility is less than 8 km.
options.d: 2000 ft or the ground visibility is less than 5 km.
